title: cineraria integrifolia var. alpina
intro: Cineraria integrifolia var. alpina, also known as Cape marigold or Silver daisy, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cineraria integrifolia var. alpina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which are used to treat various health conditions, such as eczema and acne.
